alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 4 at 12:18PM EST until March 6 at 12:00PM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation expected. Total snow and sleet
accumulations up to two inches and ice accumulations up to
one-tenth of an inch.

* WHERE...The Connecticut River Valley in Connecticut and
Massachusetts, northwest Rhode Island, as well as eastern and
northeast Massachusetts.

* WHEN...From 5 PM Thursday to noon EST Friday.

* IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions. The hazardous
conditions could impact the Thursday evening and Friday morning
commutes.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Partly Cloudy then Areas Of Fog
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog after 3am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 31. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Areas Of Fog then Light Rain Likely
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog before 1pm, then a chance of rain between 1pm and 5pm, then rain likely and a chance of sleet. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 37. Northeast wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and sleet likely before 7pm, then sleet and rain and snow between 7pm and 8pm, then sleet and a chance of rain and snow between 8pm and 1am, then sleet and rain and snow between 1am and 3am, then sleet and rain and snow between 3am and 4am, then sleet likely and rain and snow. Cloudy, with a low around 33. Northeast wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow. Cloudy, with a high near 35. Northeast wind 12 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 34. East wind 3 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. South wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 9am. Partly sunny, with a high near 51. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 55. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 59. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain and isolated thunderstorms after 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 45. Southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 59. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.
